def: The yellowish white opaque creamy matter produced by theprocess of suppuration. It consists of innumerable white nucleatedcells floating in a clear liquid.
Of or pertaining to an auction or an auctioneer. [R.]With auctionary hammer in thy hand. Dryden.
Of or pertaining to weight; as, a ponderary system. [R.]M'Culloch.
Having a great belly, bigbellied; pregnant; teeming. Shak.
The act of addressing or directing one's course. [Rare & Obs.]Chapman.
A small stick or rod of steel, formerly used in adjusting theplaits of ruffs. Shak.
The yellowish white opaque creamy matter produced by theprocess of suppuration. It consists of innumerable white nucleatedcells floating in a clear liquid.
